prompt: Create a clean 2x2 candidate sheet of treasure chest reward icons for Orbwalker: Elemental Chest and Fire Chest, each in two variations. No readable text or labels. Polished stylized 2D game icon art, mobile-readable, ornate fantasy chests with elemental orb magic, no watermark, no casino imagery, no baked checkerboard.
negative_constraints: no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, no gore, no unapproved text, no baked checkerboard
